/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCE/X:THE COURT CORRECTS THE RECORD TO REFLECTTHAT THE PRIOR CONVICTION FROM JUNE 17, 2003 WHICH WAS ALLEGED PURSUANT TOPC 667,5(B), IS ORDERED TO BE STAYED AS OPPOSED TO RUNNING CONCURRENTLY/X:THIS ORDER IS NUNC PRO TUNC TO THE DATE OF SENTENCE, NOVEMBER 3, 2015/X:THE TOTAL STATE PRISON SENTENCE OF 5 YEARS AND 8 MONTHS REMAINS/

/CAL:SENTENCING & ADDRESS THE LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE/X:COURT VACATED THENOT GUILTY VERDICT ON 2800,1VC,MISD -THE LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF COUNT 4SINCE THE JURY FOUND THE DEFENDANT GUILTY OF THE  GREATER OFFENSE OF 2800,2(A)VC,FELONY/X:2800,2(A)VC,FELONY IS COUNT 4 OF THE FIRST AMENDED INFORMATION/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED/DEF:SPOKE IN COURT/X:ON 09-11-15 COURT FOUND TRUE THE FOLLOWING 3 PRIOR CONVICTIONS PER PC 667,5(B)=/X:PRIOR CONVICTIONS ON 06-17-2003 & 06-28-2007 & 11-12-2008/AJW/CH6:SP3Y:U/ENH:CH6:TYPE667,5(B)PC:TI1Y:S/ENH:CH6:TYPE667,5(B)PC:TI1Y:CS/ENH:CH6:TYPE667,5(B)PC:TI1Y:CS/X:AS TO THE PRIOR CONVICTION ON 06-17-2003 -THE 1 YR STATE PRISON  SENTENCE PC 667,5(B) IS STAYED/X:TOTAL 5  YEARS-8 MONTHS STATE PRISON/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 563 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 563 SAGE  FOR A TOTAL OF 1,126 DAYS,/STATES/DNACOMP/DEF:TO PAY RESTITUTION/X:RESTITUTION AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED ON A LATER DATE/X:COURT RESERVED JURISDICTION AS TO THE RESTITUTION/COA:40/ICNA/X:RESTITUTION FINE PER PC 1202,4 IS $300 PER CONVICTED COUNT FOR A TOTAL OF $600,00/VF5:600/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/APPEAL/
